topics.display_name: Which Minecraft Biome Best Matches Your Vibe?

synopsis.title: Which Minecraft Biome Best Matches Your Vibe?
synopsis.summary: Are you a cozy builder who loves a sunset over the plains, or a daring explorer navigating the depths of the Deep Dark? Your Minecraft playstyle says everything about your real-world personality and how you handle adventure. Take this quiz to discover which iconic landscape truly reflects your inner energy. Whether you're chill like a Cherry Grove or mysterious like the Mushroom Fields, your blocky destiny awaits!

characters.name: Plains
characters.short_description: A reliable and open-hearted individual who thrives on simplicity and building strong foundations.
characters.profile_text:
You are the bedrock of your social circle, offering a sense of stability and clarity that others find deeply comforting. Like the wide-open horizon of the plains, you prefer transparency and honesty over complex social games. You enjoy the freedom to build your life from the ground up, valuing practical solutions and the beauty of a well-organized routine. Your strength lies in your accessibility; people know they can always count on you to be present and grounded in reality.

However, your preference for the familiar can sometimes lead to a fear of the unknown. You might find yourself staying in your comfort zone for too long, missing out on the excitement that comes with more rugged or unpredictable environments. While your consistency is a virtue, remember that a little bit of spontaneity can add color to your wide-open world. You are most compatible with those who appreciate a steady hand and a clear path forward.

characters.name: Cherry Grove
characters.short_description: A whimsical and romantic soul who finds beauty in the delicate details of life.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a gentle and aesthetic-driven nature, often seeing the world through a lens of soft colors and poetic moments. Like the falling petals of a cherry blossom tree, you bring a sense of grace and tranquility wherever you go. You are likely drawn to creative pursuits, finding joy in the process of making things look beautiful and harmonious. Your presence is a breath of fresh air, encouraging others to slow down and appreciate the fleeting magic of the present moment.

Your sensitivity is your greatest asset, but it can also make you vulnerable to the harsher realities of life. You may struggle when faced with conflict or environments that feel cold and utilitarian. It is important for you to surround yourself with supportive people who value your soft-hearted approach. When you feel safe, your creativity flourishes, allowing you to turn even the simplest setting into a dreamlike sanctuary that inspires everyone around you.

characters.name: Mushroom Fields
characters.short_description: A rare and eccentric spirit who offers a safe haven of peace and unconventional wisdom.
characters.profile_text:
You are truly one of a kind, possessing a vibe that is both mysterious and incredibly welcoming. Much like the rare mushroom islands, you march to the beat of your own drum and aren't afraid to stand out from the crowd. You have a knack for creating safe zones where stress and negativity cannot penetrate. People are drawn to your unique perspective and the calm, non-judgmental atmosphere you naturally cultivate. You value peace above all else and often act as a mediator in difficult situations.

Because you are so distinct, you might occasionally feel isolated or misunderstood by those who prefer more traditional paths. Your laid-back nature can sometimes be mistaken for a lack of ambition, but in reality, you simply prioritize well-being over the rat race. You thrive when you find a community that celebrates your quirks rather than trying to change them. Your strength is your ability to remain untouched by the chaos of the outside world, providing a unique refuge for yourself and those you love.

characters.name: Deep Dark
characters.short_description: An introspective and intense individual who values silence, depth, and hidden truths.
characters.profile_text:
You are a person of profound depth and quiet power, often preferring the shadows of reflection to the bright lights of the spotlight. Like the ancient cities hidden deep underground, you possess a rich inner world that few people ever get to see in its entirety. You are highly observant and sensitive to the vibrations of your environment, picking up on subtle cues that others miss. You value privacy and meaningful silence, finding that the most important truths are often found in the quietest moments.

Your intensity can be intimidating to those who prefer surface-level interactions. You may have a tendency to withdraw when things become too loud or chaotic, which can lead to feelings of loneliness if you do not reach out. However, those who earn your trust find a fiercely loyal and insightful companion. You are not afraid to face the scary parts of life, and your resilience in the face of darkness is truly remarkable. You are most compatible with those who respect boundaries and appreciate the beauty of the unknown.

characters.name: Jungle
characters.short_description: A vibrant and adventurous personality who thrives on growth, complexity, and constant discovery.
characters.profile_text:
You are a whirlwind of energy and curiosity, always looking for the next big adventure or the next hidden secret. Like the dense canopy of a jungle, your life is full of layers, interests, and a constant drive for expansion. You are naturally resourceful and adaptable, able to navigate complex social situations and difficult challenges with ease. You love to be surrounded by life and activity, finding inspiration in the diversity and richness of the world around you.

Because you are always moving and growing, you might sometimes feel overwhelmed by your own ambitions or the sheer volume of your commitments. Your desire for more can lead to restlessness if you do not take the time to ground yourself. You may find it difficult to focus on one thing for too long, as there is always something new and shiny catching your eye. However, your infectious enthusiasm and ability to find opportunity in the thickest brush make you a natural leader and a thrilling person to be around.

characters.name: Desert
characters.short_description: A resilient and minimalist thinker who values efficiency, endurance, and hidden treasures.
characters.profile_text:
You are a person of great mental fortitude and clarity, preferring a life stripped of unnecessary fluff. Like the vast expanse of the desert, you are direct and uncompromising, valuing truth and efficiency above all else. You have an incredible ability to endure hardships that would break others, showing a level of grit and determination that is truly inspiring. You do not need much to be happy, but what you do have, you value deeply. You are a master of making the most out of limited resources.

Your straightforward nature can sometimes come across as blunt or distant to more sensitive individuals. You might struggle with emotional expression, preferring to focus on logic and survival rather than feelings. It is important to remember that even the driest desert has its oases; allowing yourself to be vulnerable and seek out connection is vital for your long-term well-being. Beneath your tough exterior lies a wealth of wisdom and a surprising capacity for deep, lasting loyalty to those who can handle your heat.

I dive into the most challenging parts first to see what I'm made of.
I focus on making it look beautiful and harmonious from the very beginning.
I explore every possible angle and detail, even if it gets a bit chaotic.

topics.display_name: Which Iconic Disney Villain Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Disney Villain Matches Your Dark Side?
synopsis.summary: Have you ever felt like the hero's journey is just a bit too predictable? It's time to embrace your inner antagonist and discover which legendary Disney baddie truly mirrors your personality. Whether you're plotting a royal takeover or just seeking a little revenge, your choices will reveal your true villainous identity. Take this quiz to find out if you're more of a sea witch or a fashion-obsessed heiress!

characters.name: Ursula
characters.short_description: You are a charismatic deal-maker who uses wit and powerful magic to claim what you believe is rightfully yours.
characters.profile_text: You possess a larger-than-life personality and a flair for the dramatic that makes you impossible to ignore. Like the Sea Witch herself, you are a master of the fine print, using your keen understanding of human nature and desire to orchestrate complex deals that always seem to favor your interests. You value ambition and aren't afraid to get your hands dirty to achieve your goals, often viewing yourself as a misunderstood outcast who is simply reclaiming the status you deserve. Your confidence is your greatest strength, allowing you to command any room you enter with a mixture of humor and intimidation. However, your tendency to underestimate the power of genuine connection can be your downfall. You often view relationships as transactional, which can leave you isolated when your schemes face unexpected resistance. While your tactical mind is brilliant, your thirst for revenge and absolute control can cloud your judgment, leading you to take risks that even your formidable magic might not be able to fix.

characters.name: Maleficent
characters.short_description: You are a powerful, elegant force of nature who demands respect and possesses an uncompromising sense of justice.
characters.profile_text: You carry yourself with a regal poise and an aura of mystery that commands immediate attention. As a person who values tradition and etiquette, you take slights very seriously and believe that every action deserves a proportional reaction. You are not one for petty squabbles; instead, you focus on the long game, exerting your influence through patience and overwhelming presence. Your strengths lie in your unwavering focus and your ability to remain calm and calculated even when others are panicking. You are a natural leader who expects excellence from those around you, and you have little patience for incompetence or lack of vision. Your pitfall is often your own pride and the depth of your grudges. Because you feel things so deeply and hold yourself to such a high standard, you find it difficult to forgive or move past perceived betrayals. This intensity can make you appear cold or unapproachable, masking a complex inner world where you feel justified in your most extreme actions. You are a protector of your own domain, but your definition of protection often involves total dominance.

characters.name: Scar
characters.short_description: You are a sharp-witted strategist who relies on intellect and manipulation to overcome those who rely on brute strength.
characters.profile_text: You have always felt like the smartest person in the room, and you likely are. Because you lack the raw physical power or social standing of those around you, you have honed your mind into a lethal weapon, specializing in psychological manipulation and long-term planning. You are a master of finding the weak points in any system or individual and exploiting them to your advantage. You prefer to work from the shadows, letting others do the heavy lifting while you pull the strings to ensure the outcome serves your ultimate ambition. Your greatest strength is your adaptability and your ability to charm others into following your lead, even when your intentions are purely self-serving. However, your cynicism and deep-seated resentment can be your undoing. You often struggle with feelings of inadequacy that drive you to seek power at any cost, yet once you achieve it, you may find that you lack the actual leadership skills required to maintain it. Your tendency to look down on others prevents you from building the loyal foundations necessary for lasting success, leaving you vulnerable to the very chaos you helped create.

characters.name: Cruella de Vil
characters.short_description: You are a high-fashion visionary with an obsessive drive and a total disregard for conventional boundaries.
characters.profile_text: You are defined by your singular focus and your absolute refusal to settle for anything less than the best. Whether it is a career goal or a personal aesthetic, you pursue your desires with a manic energy that both terrifies and impresses those around you. You don't care about rules or social norms; you believe that the world exists to be molded to your specific tastes. Your creativity is boundless, and you have a knack for seeing potential where others see nothing, making you a formidable force in any creative or competitive environment. You are the ultimate individualist, thriving on the edge of chaos and luxury. Your primary pitfall is your lack of empathy and your inability to see beyond your own immediate wants. This tunnel vision can lead you to make reckless decisions that alienate potential allies and put you in precarious positions. You often mistake obsession for passion, and when things don't go your way, your temper can flare in spectacular fashion. While your drive is unmatched, your refusal to consider the consequences of your actions means you are often the architect of your own most dramatic failures.

characters.name: Hades
characters.short_description: You are a fast-talking, high-stress professional who uses humor and logic to navigate a world that feels stacked against you.
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate middle manager of the underworld, constantly juggling a million tasks while dealing with incompetent subordinates. You have a dry, sarcastic wit that serves as both a defense mechanism and a way to assert your intellectual superiority. You are highly organized and logical, preferring a well-laid plan over impulsive action, though your short fuse often gets the better of you when things go off the rails. Your strength lies in your ability to negotiate and find loopholes, making you a master of the contract in both literal and figurative senses. You are surprisingly relatable because your frustrations usually stem from a genuine desire to see things run efficiently. However, your explosive temper is a significant liability. When you lose your cool, you tend to burn bridges and lose sight of the bigger picture. Your bitterness over being overlooked or given the short straw in life can lead you to pursue power not for the sake of ruling, but out of a desire for validation. You are a strategist at heart, but your emotional volatility often undermines your most brilliant schemes.

characters.name: Jafar
characters.short_description: You are a patient, calculating advisor who seeks total control through a combination of mysticism and political maneuvering.
characters.profile_text: You are a master of the long con, possessing the patience to wait years for the perfect moment to strike. You likely occupy a position of influence where you can observe and manipulate events from behind the scenes, using your keen insight into the desires of others to guide them toward your own ends. You value knowledge and power above all else, often delving into obscure or complex subjects to gain an edge over your rivals. You are cold, methodical, and rarely let your true emotions show, preferring to maintain a mask of calm professionalism even as you plot your ascent. Your greatest strength is your discipline and your ability to remain focused on a singular goal despite numerous obstacles. You are a perfectionist who demands total loyalty and absolute results. Your downfall, however, is your insatiable greed and your tendency to become blinded by your own success. Once you get a taste of true power, you often lose the caution that got you there, leading you to make arrogant mistakes. You underestimate the street rats of the world, believing that your superior intellect and resources make you invincible, which often leaves you trapped by your own hubris.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation for seeking power or influence?

options.text: To reclaim a status or home I feel was unfairly denied to me.
To avenge a personal slight and demand the respect I deserve.
To prove my intellectual superiority over those who rely on brute force.
To fulfill a singular, obsessive vision of perfection and style.
To finally get a promotion and escape a stressful, thankless job.
To gain absolute control and knowledge over my entire environment.

options.text: I offer them a tempting deal with very specific fine print.
I exert my presence and wait for them to realize their mistake.
I use psychological manipulation to turn their own allies against them.
I ignore their concerns and bulldoze through them with sheer energy.
I try to negotiate logically, though I might lose my temper if they're slow.
I act as a helpful advisor while slowly undermining their position.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment makes you feel most in your element?

options.text: A place where I am the charismatic center of attention.
A secluded, majestic fortress where I can maintain my privacy.
The shadows, where I can observe others without being noticed.
A high-stakes world of luxury, fashion, and constant movement.
A busy, organized workspace where I am the one in charge of the chaos.
A quiet chamber filled with ancient secrets and powerful tools.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you consider to be your greatest tactical strength?

options.text: My ability to read people's deepest desires and exploit them.
My unwavering focus and refusal to compromise my standards.
My sharp wit and ability to find the weak point in any system.
My relentless drive and willingness to do whatever it takes.
My ability to manage complex contracts and find clever loopholes.
My extreme patience and ability to play the long game.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these 'villainous' traits do you relate to the most?

options.text: Holding a grudge until the perfect moment for a dramatic reveal.
Feeling like I am constantly surrounded by people who don't appreciate my genius.
Letting my passions turn into all-consuming, manic obsessions.
Having a very short fuse when things don't go according to my plan.
Never being satisfied with the level of power I currently hold.
Viewing every relationship as a transaction or a deal to be won.

topics.display_name: Which Pokémon Type Would You Specialize In?

synopsis.title: Which Pokémon Type Would You Specialize In?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered which elemental affinity truly matches your soul? Whether you're a fierce competitor or a gentle caretaker, your personality aligns with one of the world's core powers. Answer these lifestyle questions to discover if you're a master of the shadows, a beacon of light, or a force of nature.

characters.name: Fire
characters.short_description: You are a passionate and high-energy leader who thrives in the heat of competition.
characters.profile_text: You possess an unyielding spirit and a drive that burns brighter than most. In battle and in life, you prefer a direct approach, overwhelming obstacles with sheer force and enthusiasm. Your personality is magnetic, often drawing others to your warmth, but you must be careful not to let your temper flare or your intensity consume those around you. You value courage and raw power above all else, seeking out challenges that test your limits. You are a person of action, rarely content to sit on the sidelines when there is a goal to be achieved. Your strategic style is offensive and fast-paced, reflecting a desire to end conflicts quickly and decisively. While your confidence is one of your greatest strengths, it can occasionally border on recklessness if you do not take the time to cool down and assess the situation. You thrive in environments where you can express your creativity and passion without restraint.

characters.name: Water
characters.short_description: You are a versatile and resilient individual who can adapt to any situation with grace.
characters.profile_text: Much like the ocean, you possess a depth of character that is both calming and formidable. You understand that flexibility is the key to overcoming any barrier, and you are skilled at shifting your tactics to meet the needs of the moment. Whether you are providing support to your allies or crashing down on your opponents with relentless force, you remain composed and focused. You value emotional intelligence and the ability to flow with the changes of life rather than resisting them. Your patience is a significant asset, allowing you to wait for the perfect opening before making your move. You are often seen as a stabilizing force in your social circles, offering a sense of peace even in turbulent times. However, your tendency to go with the flow can sometimes lead to indecisiveness or a lack of clear direction if you are not careful. By balancing your gentle nature with a firm sense of purpose, you become an unstoppable force that can wear down even the toughest defenses over time.

characters.name: Grass
characters.short_description: You are a nurturing and patient soul who finds strength in harmony and steady growth.
characters.profile_text: You have a deep appreciation for the natural world and the slow, deliberate process of development. You are not one for flashy displays of power; instead, you prefer to plant the seeds of success and watch them flourish through careful cultivation. Your approach to life is holistic, focusing on the well-being of your environment and the people within it. You excel at outlasting your problems, using your endurance and resourcefulness to turn the tide in your favor when others might give up. Your kindness and empathy make you a natural healer and a loyal friend. You often find beauty in the small things and possess a quiet resilience that surprises those who underestimate you. However, your desire for peace and stability can sometimes make you resistant to necessary change or overly cautious when bold action is required. By embracing the seasons of life and recognizing when it is time to shed the old to make room for the new, you maintain a vibrant and enduring presence in any community.

characters.name: Electric
characters.short_description: You are a dynamic and fast-thinking innovator who brings a spark of energy to everything you do.
characters.profile_text: You live life at a high frequency, always looking for the next big idea or the quickest path to victory. Your mind moves as fast as lightning, allowing you to process information and react to changes in an instant. You are often the catalyst for change in your group, providing the momentum needed to get projects off the ground. You value efficiency and precision, preferring to strike hard and fast before your opposition even realizes what has happened. Your infectious energy can light up a room, making you a natural motivator and a thrilling companion. You are drawn to technology and modern solutions, always seeking ways to optimize your performance. The pitfall of your high-voltage lifestyle is the risk of burnout; if you do not find ways to ground yourself, you may find your focus scattering or your energy depleting as quickly as it rose. Learning to channel your intensity into sustainable efforts ensures that your brilliance continues to shine without flickering out.

characters.name: Psychic
characters.short_description: You are a thoughtful and perceptive intellectual who relies on the power of the mind to navigate the world.
characters.profile_text: You believe that knowledge is the ultimate form of power and that every problem can be solved through logic and intuition. You are often found deep in thought, analyzing patterns and predicting outcomes that others might miss. Your calm demeanor hides a sharp and active intellect that is constantly seeking to expand its horizons. You prefer to work smarter, not harder, using your mental acuity to manipulate circumstances in your favor without ever breaking a sweat. Your ability to see beyond the surface makes you an excellent strategist and a wise advisor. You value clarity and truth, often distancing yourself from emotional drama to maintain your objective perspective. However, this detachment can sometimes make you appear cold or unapproachable to those who operate on a more visceral level. By bridging the gap between your intellect and your emotions, you can use your insights to connect more deeply with others while still maintaining the mental edge that defines your unique approach to life.

characters.name: Dark
characters.short_description: You are a pragmatic and cunning strategist who is not afraid to embrace the shadows to achieve your goals.
characters.profile_text: You understand that the world is not always black and white, and you are comfortable navigating the gray areas that others might avoid. You value self-reliance and cleverness, often staying several steps ahead of your rivals by anticipating their moves and exploiting their weaknesses. You are not concerned with traditional notions of fair play if they stand in the way of what is necessary. Your mysterious nature often keeps people guessing, giving you a tactical advantage in both social and competitive situations. You are fiercely protective of your inner circle, though you rarely let your guard down for just anyone. Your strengths lie in your resilience and your ability to thrive under pressure, often turning a disadvantage into a winning opportunity through sheer wit. The danger of your path is a tendency toward cynicism or isolation, as your guarded nature can prevent you from forming meaningful bonds. By learning to trust the right people, you can combine your formidable strategic mind with a support system that makes you truly invincible.

I remain patient and wait for the right moment to nurture a resolution.

I keep my thoughts guarded and wait to see how they react first.

options.text: The thrill of the spark and the speed of initial progress.
The long-term satisfaction of steady, sustainable growth.
The desire to master a complex system and gain new insights.
The opportunity to prove my resourcefulness and win.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these personal strengths do you value most in yourself?

options.text: My unwavering courage and infectious enthusiasm.
My emotional resilience and ability to stay calm under pressure.
My mental sharpness and ability to predict future trends.
My pragmatic mindset and ability to do whatever is necessary.

topics.display_name: Which Stardew Valley Bachelor or Bachelorette Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Stardew Valley Bachelor or Bachelorette Are You?
synopsis.summary: Have you ever wondered which Pelican Town resident truly matches your soul? Whether you spend your days mining in the caves, tending to your crops, or dreaming of the city, there is a villager who shares your unique outlook on life. Take this quiz to discover which of the twelve eligible bachelors and bachelorettes reflects your personality best.

characters.name: Abigail
characters.short_description: You are a spirited adventurer with a taste for the occult and a rebellious streak that leads you toward the unknown.
characters.profile_text:
You are someone who finds beauty in the unconventional, often preferring the mystery of a rainy graveyard or the depths of a dark cave to the mundane routines of daily life. Your personality is a blend of artistic sensitivity and fierce independence, marked by your love for music and your desire to prove your strength. You do not just follow the path set before you; you seek out excitement and are not afraid to challenge social norms to find your own truth.

While your bravery is a significant strength, your restless nature can sometimes make you feel misunderstood by those who value tradition. You have a deep-seated need for autonomy and can be quite stubborn when your freedom is questioned. However, your loyalty to your friends and your willingness to face your fears head-on make you a captivating and reliable companion for anyone looking to explore the mysteries of the world.

characters.name: Emily
characters.short_description: You are a vibrant, spiritual soul who finds magic in the everyday and expresses your unique vision through creative arts.
characters.profile_text:
You possess an infectious energy and a deep connection to the spiritual world, often seeing signs and wonders where others see only the ordinary. Your creativity knows no bounds, whether you are sewing your own clothes or dancing to the rhythm of your own heart. You are a true individualist who values kindness and positive energy above all else, making you a beacon of light for those around you who might be feeling lost or cynical.

Your openness to the universe is your greatest asset, allowing you to find joy in the simplest of things, like a beautiful gemstone or a stray bird. However, your eccentricities can sometimes lead others to perceive you as flighty or detached from reality. Despite this, your unwavering commitment to your personal values and your genuine desire to help others heal and grow ensure that your impact on the world is both profound and colorful.

characters.name: Haley
characters.short_description: You are a stylish individual with a keen eye for beauty and a hidden depth that reveals itself through patience and genuine connection.
characters.profile_text:
You have a sophisticated appreciation for the finer things in life, often focusing on aesthetics, fashion, and the perfect photographic shot. To many, you might appear focused on the surface, but this stems from a desire to surround yourself with beauty and order. You are confident in your tastes and are not afraid to speak your mind, even if it comes across as blunt. Your journey is often one of self-discovery, learning to find value in the rustic and the real rather than just the polished.

As you open up, your talent for photography reveals a person who truly notices the world around them, capturing moments that others might overlook. Your initial coldness is often a protective shell, and once it is breached, you show a surprising capacity for growth and warmth. You thrive when you are challenged to see beyond your comfort zone, proving that there is much more to your character than meets the eye.

characters.name: Leah
characters.short_description: You are a talented artist and nature lover who values independence and the quiet fulfillment of a life lived authentically.
characters.profile_text:
You are most at home in the quiet corners of the woods, where you can draw inspiration from the natural world for your sculptures and paintings. Your spirit is one of fierce self-reliance; you are not afraid to leave behind the noise of the city to pursue a simpler, more meaningful existence. You value honesty and hard work, often spending your days foraging or honing your craft with a dedication that borders on perfectionism.

While your independence is a source of great strength, it can sometimes lead to a sense of isolation as you struggle to let others into your private world. You have a sensitive heart that feels the weight of past experiences, yet you use that emotion to fuel your creative output. Your ability to find beauty in a piece of driftwood or a wild berry reflects a soul that is deeply grounded and remarkably resilient.

characters.name: Maru
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant and curious mind who finds joy in scientific discovery, technological innovation, and the wonders of the cosmos.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a logical and inquisitive nature, always seeking to understand how the world works through the lens of science and engineering. Whether you are assisting in a medical clinic or building a complex robot in your workshop, your focus is on progress and problem-solving. You have a natural talent for mathematics and mechanics, and you find great satisfaction in the precision and clarity that these fields provide.

Despite your high intellect, you remain approachable and kind, often using your skills to help those in your community. Your tendency to get lost in your projects can sometimes make you appear distant, but it is simply a reflection of your intense passion for learning. You balance a grounded, practical approach to life with a sense of wonder for the stars, making you a person who is both reliable and visionary.

characters.name: Penny
characters.short_description: You are a gentle, bookish soul with a nurturing heart who dreams of building a stable, loving home for those you care about.
characters.profile_text:
You are a quiet observer who finds solace in the pages of a book and the simple act of helping others learn. Your life is defined by your kindness and your commitment to your community, particularly the children you mentor. You possess a quiet strength, navigating a modest and sometimes difficult domestic life with grace and a hope for a better future. You value stability, tradition, and the warmth of a close-knit family above all else.

Your selflessness is your most defining trait, as you often put the needs of others before your own desires. However, this can sometimes lead to you neglecting your own happiness or feeling trapped by your circumstances. You are a dreamer who seeks a peaceful sanctuary from the world's chaos, and your ability to find contentment in the small, domestic joys of life makes you a deeply compassionate and steadfast presence in the lives of those you love.

Curling up with a good book in a quiet, cozy corner.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when faced with a difficult challenge?

The need to find a logical, efficient solution through data and testing.
The hope of creating a better, more stable environment for those I love.
The drive to maintain my independence and stay true to my personal vision.

topics.display_name: What Is Your Enneagram Personality Type?

synopsis.title: What Is Your Enneagram Personality Type?
synopsis.summary: Discover which of the nine distinct personality types defines your core motivations and fears. This quiz uses the Enneagram system to provide a factual look at how you perceive the world and manage your emotions. Gain insight into your unique strengths and challenges to better understand your personal growth path.

characters.name: The Reformer
characters.short_description: You are a principled and purposeful individual who strives for integrity and improvement in all aspects of life.
characters.profile_text: You possess a strong sense of right and wrong, often acting as a moral compass for those around you. Your drive for perfection leads you to be highly organized, ethical, and fastidious, as you believe that everything can and should be better. You value honesty and consistency, often setting high standards for yourself and others to ensure that your environment reflects your internal values. However, this pursuit of excellence can sometimes manifest as a critical inner voice or a tendency toward resentment when things do not meet your expectations. You may struggle with perfectionism, finding it difficult to relax or accept flaws in a world that feels inherently messy. Learning to balance your high ideals with self-compassion is key to your growth, allowing you to appreciate progress without demanding absolute perfection.

characters.name: The Helper
characters.short_description: You are a generous and demonstrative person who finds deep fulfillment in supporting and connecting with others.
characters.profile_text: You are naturally empathetic and sensitive to the needs of those around you, often going out of your way to provide care and assistance. Your warmth and sincerity make you a pillar of support in your social circles, as you prioritize building strong, meaningful relationships. You thrive on being needed and take great pride in your ability to nurture others, often anticipating their desires before they even express them. Despite your selfless nature, you may find yourself neglecting your own needs in favor of serving others, which can lead to burnout or feelings of being unappreciated. You might struggle with the fear of being unwanted or unworthy of love, sometimes using your helpfulness as a way to secure affection. Developing healthy boundaries and learning to acknowledge your own requirements is essential for maintaining your well-being and ensuring your generosity remains sustainable.

characters.name: The Achiever
characters.short_description: You are a driven and success-oriented individual who excels at setting goals and maintaining a polished, effective image.
characters.profile_text: You are characterized by your high energy, ambition, and remarkable ability to adapt to various situations to achieve your objectives. You are often highly competent and efficient, possessing a natural talent for leadership and a keen eye for what it takes to succeed in any given field. Your focus on productivity and results makes you a formidable force in professional environments, where you are frequently admired for your accomplishments and poise. On the downside, your intense focus on external validation and performance can lead you to lose touch with your authentic self. You may become overly concerned with how others perceive you, prioritizing your public image over your internal feelings or personal values. This drive can result in workaholism and a tendency to suppress emotions to maintain a facade of constant success. Finding value in who you are rather than just what you do is your path to true fulfillment.

characters.name: The Individualist
characters.short_description: You are a sensitive and introspective person who seeks to express your unique identity and find deep meaning in your experiences.
characters.profile_text: You possess a rich inner world and a profound appreciation for beauty, authenticity, and emotional depth. You are often drawn to creative pursuits and are not afraid to explore the more complex or melancholy aspects of the human condition. Your desire to be special and different stems from a need to understand your own identity, making you highly self-aware and expressive in your personal style and communication. However, your focus on what is missing in your life can lead to feelings of envy or a sense of being misunderstood by those around you. You may struggle with moodiness or a tendency to withdraw into your own thoughts when you feel overwhelmed by the world's perceived mundanity. By grounding yourself in the present and recognizing the commonalities you share with others, you can balance your need for uniqueness with a sense of belonging and practical action.

characters.name: The Investigator
characters.short_description: You are an analytical and perceptive observer who values knowledge, independence, and a deep understanding of the world.
characters.profile_text: You are characterized by your intellectual curiosity and your desire to master complex subjects through rigorous study and observation. You prefer to step back and analyze situations from a distance, gathering information to feel prepared and capable before engaging with others. Your independence is paramount, and you often require significant periods of solitude to recharge and process your thoughts without external interference. While your insight and objectivity are great strengths, you may find yourself becoming detached or isolated from your emotions and social environment. You might struggle with a fear of being overwhelmed by the demands of others, leading you to hoard your resources and energy. Learning to share your findings and connect more deeply with your physical and emotional needs can help you bridge the gap between your internal world and the reality around you.

characters.name: The Loyalist
characters.short_description: You are a committed and security-oriented individual who values stability, community, and being prepared for potential challenges.
characters.profile_text: You are exceptionally reliable and hardworking, often serving as the glue that holds groups and families together through your dedication and foresight. You have a keen ability to anticipate risks and develop strategies to mitigate them, making you an excellent problem-solver and a trustworthy ally. Your loyalty to your beliefs and your social circle is unwavering, as you seek to create a safe and predictable environment for yourself and those you care about. Despite your strengths, you may experience significant anxiety or self-doubt, often questioning your own judgment or the intentions of others. This can lead to a cycle of overthinking or a tendency to become overly dependent on authority figures or established systems for reassurance. Building self-confidence and learning to trust your own intuition will allow you to navigate uncertainty with greater ease and less apprehension.

baseline_questions.question_text: When starting a new project, what is your primary focus?

options.text: Ensuring every detail meets high standards of integrity and quality.
Making sure everyone involved feels supported and appreciated.
Determining the most efficient way to achieve a successful result.
Infusing the project with a unique and meaningful personal touch.
Gathering all necessary information to understand the mechanics deeply.
Identifying potential risks and ensuring the plan is secure.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically manage your emotions in a professional setting?

options.text: I prioritize self-control and doing what is objectively right.
I use my sensitivity to connect with and nurture others.
I set aside my feelings to maintain a productive and capable image.
I embrace my emotions as a source of authenticity and insight.
I detach from my emotions to maintain an analytical perspective.
I monitor my anxiety by checking for stability and support.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these roles do you naturally gravitate toward in a group?

options.text: The ethical guide who maintains standards and improvement.
The caretaker who anticipates and meets the needs of others.
The high-performer who leads the team toward specific goals.
The creative individualist who brings a unique perspective.
The observant expert who provides deep insight and data.
The loyal protector who prepares for potential challenges.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your most frequent reaction when you encounter a significant mistake?

options.text: I become critical of myself or others for failing to be perfect.
I worry that I have become unworthy of love or appreciation.
I quickly pivot to protect my reputation and maintain progress.
I withdraw to process the personal significance of the failure.
I retreat into study to understand the technical cause of the error.
I seek reassurance and double-check my safety systems.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these core desires most influences your personal growth?

options.text: The desire to be right, virtuous, and have integrity.
The desire to be loved, wanted, and helpful to others.
The desire to be successful, admired, and valuable.
The desire to be unique, authentic, and self-aware.
The desire to be capable, competent, and independent.
The desire to be secure, stable, and well-supported.

topics.display_name: Which Internet Aesthetic Defines Your Style?

synopsis.title: Which Viral Internet Aesthetic Is Actually Your Soulmate?
synopsis.summary: Are you more of a cozy cottagecore dreamer or a high-octane cyber-sigilism enthusiast? Your digital footprint says a lot about your real-world vibe, from the music you loop to the way you organize your desk. Take this quiz to discover which internet subculture perfectly captures your unique style. It's time to find out if you're a classic minimalist or a chaotic maximalist at heart.

characters.name: Cottagecore Dreamer
characters.short_description: You find solace in the simplicity of rural life, embracing floral patterns, vintage crafts, and a deep connection to the natural world.
characters.profile_text:
You are someone who finds beauty in the slow pace of a sun-drenched afternoon spent baking bread or tending to a small herb garden. Your wardrobe is likely filled with soft linens, lace details, and earthy tones that reflect your desire to escape the frantic energy of modern technology. You value authenticity and nostalgia, often surrounding yourself with dried flowers, handwritten letters, and the comforting scent of old books. This aesthetic isn't just about fashion for you; it is a philosophy of returning to the roots of human experience and finding joy in the quiet, unhurried moments of life.

While your gentle nature makes you a soothing presence for others, you might struggle with the harsh realities of the digital age. Your tendency to romanticize the past can sometimes lead to a sense of isolation or a refusal to engage with necessary modern responsibilities. However, your ability to find magic in the mundane is a rare gift that allows you to cultivate a peaceful, intentional life that others deeply admire. By staying grounded in the present while keeping your whimsical spirit alive, you create a sanctuary for yourself and those you love.

characters.name: Cyberpunk Rebel
characters.short_description: You thrive in the high-tech, low-life intersection of neon lights, digital subversion, and a gritty urban edge.
characters.profile_text:
You are a creature of the night, navigating the concrete jungle with a sharp mind and a wardrobe dominated by leather, tech-wear, and glowing accents. Your aesthetic is defined by a fascination with the future and a healthy skepticism of authority, often manifesting in a DIY approach to both your fashion and your technology. You are likely the first to know about the latest encryption tools or underground music scenes, always staying one step ahead of the mainstream. You see the world as a complex network of systems waiting to be hacked, improved, or dismantled.

Your strength lies in your adaptability and your refusal to conform to societal norms, making you a formidable force in any fast-paced environment. However, your cynical outlook and preference for digital interfaces over human connection can sometimes leave you feeling disconnected from the world around you. You might find it difficult to trust others, leading to a solitary existence behind a screen. By balancing your technological prowess with a bit of grounded empathy, you can turn your rebellious spirit into a powerful tool for genuine change in a world that often feels cold and mechanical.

characters.name: Dark Academia Aesthete
characters.short_description: You are drawn to the intellectual pursuit of knowledge, classic literature, and the moody atmosphere of ivy-covered universities.
characters.profile_text:
You are most at home in a dimly lit library, surrounded by the smell of parchment and the weight of centuries-old secrets. Your style is sophisticated and timeless, favoring turtlenecks, wool blazers, and a palette of deep browns, forest greens, and blacks. You possess an insatiable curiosity and a passion for the arts, often losing yourself in complex poetry or philosophical debates that last until the early hours of the morning. For you, the pursuit of knowledge is a romantic endeavor, one that requires dedication, passion, and a touch of melancholy.

Your dedication to learning and your refined taste make you an eloquent and thoughtful companion, but your obsession with the tragic and the academic can sometimes lead to a brooding isolation. You may find yourself prioritizing intellectual pursuits over your physical well-being or social obligations, becoming lost in the theories of the past rather than the realities of the present. Embracing the light occasionally will help you share your vast knowledge with the world without becoming lost in the shadows of your own mind. Your challenge is to find the balance between the books you love and the life you are living.

characters.name: Minimalist Maven
characters.short_description: You champion the philosophy of "less is more," focusing on clean lines, neutral palettes, and functional elegance.
characters.profile_text:
You believe that clarity of space leads to clarity of mind, and your environment reflects this through its curated simplicity and lack of clutter. Your wardrobe consists of high-quality basics and architectural silhouettes that prioritize comfort and longevity over fleeting trends. You are a master of organization, finding peace in open spaces and the deliberate selection of every item you own, ensuring that everything serves a specific purpose. To you, beauty is found in the essential, and you have a keen eye for detail that allows you to appreciate the subtle textures of a monochrome world.

This disciplined approach gives you a sense of calm and control that others find enviable, especially in a world of constant overconsumption. However, your strict adherence to minimalism can sometimes come across as cold or uninviting to those who find comfort in chaos. You may struggle with perfectionism, feeling distressed when things are out of place or when life becomes messy. By allowing a few sentimental or "imperfect" elements into your life, you can maintain your sleek aesthetic while still projecting the warmth and personality that makes you unique. Your strength is your focus, but your growth lies in your flexibility.

characters.name: Maximalist Maverick
characters.short_description: You celebrate the bold, the bright, and the eclectic, believing that more is always better when it comes to self-expression.
characters.profile_text:
Your life is a vibrant explosion of color, pattern, and texture, where every corner of your home and every piece of your clothing tells a story. You are not afraid to clash prints or layer accessories, viewing your personal style as an ever-evolving gallery of your interests and experiences. You possess an infectious energy and a fearless approach to creativity, often inspiring those around you to break out of their shells and embrace their own eccentricities. For you, there is no such thing as too much; every object is a potential treasure and every day is an opportunity for a visual feast.

While your enthusiasm is your greatest asset, your refusal to edit can sometimes lead to sensory overload for yourself and others. You might find it difficult to focus when surrounded by so much visual stimulation, or you may struggle to find a sense of cohesion in your many projects. There is a risk of being perceived as scattered or overwhelming if you don't find a way to ground your exuberant spirit. Learning to occasionally channel your energy into a single focal point will help you make an even more powerful impact without losing your signature flair. You are a beacon of individuality in a world that often settles for the mundane.

characters.name: Vaporwave Visionary
characters.short_description: You inhabit a nostalgic dreamscape of 80s consumerism, glitched graphics, and a surreal, pastel-hued retro-futurism.
characters.profile_text:
You are fascinated by the intersection of memory and technology, often surrounding yourself with the aesthetics of a bygone digital era. Your world is painted in shades of pink, teal, and purple, filled with the sounds of slowed-down elevator music and the visual artifacts of old VHS tapes. You have a unique ability to find beauty in the "obsolete," repurposing the commercial imagery of the past into a surreal and often satirical commentary on the present. Your style is a mix of retro sportswear and digital prints, reflecting a personality that is both playful and deeply contemplative.

Your imaginative spirit and appreciation for irony make you a truly original thinker, capable of seeing the world through a distorted yet beautiful lens. However, living in a constant state of nostalgia can make it difficult for you to stay grounded in the current moment. You may find yourself chasing a feeling of "longing for a place that never existed," which can lead to a sense of detachment from reality. This escapism is a double-edged sword; while it fuels your creativity, it can also hinder your ability to form concrete connections. Balancing your visionary dreams with tangible goals will help you bring your neon-soaked fantasies into reality, allowing you to share your unique perspective with the world.

baseline_questions.question_text: How would your closest friends describe your general 'vibe'?

options.text: Gentle, nurturing, and deeply connected to nature.
Skeptical, independent, and always ahead of the curve.
Sophisticated, pensive, and slightly obsessed with the past.
Disciplined, efficient, and remarkably composed.
Energetic, eccentric, and unapologetically bold.
Dreamy, ironic, and living in a beautiful alternate reality.

topics.display_name: Which Original Avenger Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Member Of The OG Avengers Squad Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Are you the natural-born leader of the pack or the genius engineer behind the scenes? It's time to assemble and find out which of the six original MCU heroes matches your unique personality. From billionaire playboys to master assassins, your choices will reveal your true heroic identity.

characters.name: Iron Man
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant visionary who uses intellect and technology to solve the world's most complex problems.
characters.profile_text: You are a high-achieving individual who thrives on innovation and the thrill of the next big breakthrough. Your mind moves faster than those around you, which can sometimes lead to a sense of isolation or a tendency to take on the weight of the world by yourself. You possess a sharp wit and a flair for the dramatic, often masking your deep-seated vulnerabilities with a confident, charismatic exterior. While your ego can occasionally get in the way of collaboration, your heart is ultimately in the right place. You are willing to make the ultimate sacrifice if it means protecting the people you care about. Your greatest strength is your ability to reinvent yourself and learn from your mistakes, turning past failures into the fuel for future success. You value progress above all else and aren't afraid to challenge the status quo to build a better future.

characters.name: Captain America
characters.short_description: You are a principled leader defined by an unwavering moral compass and a selfless commitment to justice.
characters.profile_text: You are the bedrock of any group, providing a sense of stability and integrity that others naturally gravitate toward. Your values are not just words; they are the foundation of every action you take, even when the world around you is changing or compromising. You have a quiet strength and a resilience that allows you to stand your ground against overwhelming odds, never backing down from what you believe is right. However, your rigid adherence to tradition and duty can sometimes make it difficult for you to adapt to a modern, morally gray world. You may struggle with feelings of being out of time or disconnected from current trends, but your sincerity and loyalty earn you the respect of everyone you meet. You lead by example rather than by force, inspiring others to be the best versions of themselves through your own dedication and sacrifice.

characters.name: Thor
characters.short_description: You are a powerful and noble spirit who balances a regal heritage with a growing sense of humility and responsibility.
characters.profile_text: You possess a larger-than-life personality and a natural charisma that commands attention whenever you enter a room. Born into a position of influence, you have had to learn the hard way that true strength comes from character rather than just raw power. You are fiercely protective of your family and your home, often acting with a boldness that borders on recklessness when those you love are threatened. Your journey is one of constant growth and self-discovery as you navigate the complexities of leadership and legacy. While you can be boisterous and enjoy the finer things in life, you also carry a deep sense of duty that keeps you grounded. You are learning to temper your pride with wisdom, realizing that being a hero requires more than just winning battles; it requires the grace to admit when you are wrong and the courage to change.

characters.name: Hulk
characters.short_description: You are a complex individual struggling to balance a brilliant, gentle intellect with an intense, uncontrollable inner power.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of deep thought and immense sensitivity, often preferring the quiet of a laboratory or a book to the chaos of the outside world. There is a duality to your nature that you spend much of your time trying to manage, fearing that your more intense emotions might cause harm if left unchecked. This internal conflict makes you cautious and sometimes withdrawn, as you are acutely aware of the impact your actions can have on others. Despite your desire for peace, you possess an incredible capacity for action when pushed to the limit. Your challenge is to find a way to integrate these two sides of yourself rather than seeing them as enemies. When you finally find that balance, you become an unstoppable force for good, combining your sharp mind with a raw strength that can overcome any obstacle. You value safety and stability, but you are slowly learning that your power is a part of who you are.

characters.name: Black Widow
characters.short_description: You are a highly skilled and pragmatic strategist who excels at navigating complex situations with grace and precision.
characters.profile_text: You are a master of observation and adaptation, capable of blending into any environment and reading people with uncanny accuracy. Your past has taught you the value of secrecy and the necessity of being self-reliant, which can make it difficult for you to fully trust others. However, once you do form a bond, your loyalty is absolute and you will go to great lengths to protect your chosen family. You prefer to work behind the scenes, using your intelligence and tactical skills to solve problems before they escalate. While you may appear stoic or detached, you possess a deep well of empathy and a desire to make amends for past mistakes. You don't need the spotlight to feel validated; you find satisfaction in the quiet execution of a job well done and the knowledge that you are making a tangible difference in a complicated world.

characters.name: Hawkeye
characters.short_description: You are a grounded and reliable specialist who relies on focus, skill, and a deep devotion to your loved ones.
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate underdog who proves that dedication and practice can rival any superpower. You have a keen eye for detail and a steady hand, allowing you to see opportunities where others see only obstacles. You are often the most relatable member of your group, keeping your feet firmly on the ground and reminding everyone of what is truly at stake: the people and the homes they are fighting for. Your greatest strength is your reliability; when things are at their worst, you are the one who stays focused and gets the job done without complaint. You value your privacy and your personal life above all else, seeing your work as a means to protect the things that truly matter. While you might feel overshadowed by flashier personalities, your presence is the glue that holds the team together, providing a necessary perspective on the human cost of every conflict.

Take command and organize everyone into a cohesive unit.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle your past mistakes or regrets?
