I view them as lessons in humility on my path to growth.
I fear them, as they remind me of what happens when I lose control.
I compartmentalize them and focus on the mission at hand.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these environments do you feel most comfortable in?

options.text: A high-tech lab filled with the latest gadgets.
A formal ceremony or a place with deep historical roots.
A grand social gathering where I can be the center of attention.
A quiet, secluded space where I can be alone with my thoughts.
A bustling city where I can blend in and remain anonymous.
A cozy home surrounded by my closest family and friends.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you value most in a teammate or partner?

options.text: Intellectual brilliance and the ability to keep up with me.
Unwavering loyalty and a strong moral compass.
Bravery and a willingness to stand by me in battle.
Patience and an understanding of my inner struggles.
Competence and the ability to keep a secret.
Reliability and a down-to-earth perspective.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest personal challenge when working in a group?

options.text: My ego and the desire to do everything my way.
My difficulty in adapting to modern or changing rules.
My tendency to be overconfident or impulsive.
My fear of my own intensity and what I might do.
My struggle to fully trust others with my true self.
Feeling like my contributions are less flashy than others.

topics.display_name: Which Great House of Westeros Do You Belong To?

synopsis.title: Which Great House of Westeros Do You Truly Belong To?
synopsis.summary: The Game of Thrones is a dangerous dance, and every player needs a banner to follow. From the frozen heights of Winterfell to the golden halls of Casterly Rock, your values and choices define your allegiance. Take this quiz to discover which noble lineage matches your spirit and whether you will lead with honor, fire, or cunning.

characters.name: House Stark
characters.short_description: You are a stoic guardian of the North, defined by your unwavering honor and resilience in the face of hardship.
characters.profile_text:
You value duty and loyalty above all else, often finding your strength in the quiet solitude of the North. Like the direwolf on your sigil, you are fiercely protective of your pack and believe that the lone wolf dies while the pack survives. You are not one for the intricate games of court or the pursuit of power for its own sake; instead, you focus on what is right and necessary to protect your people and your legacy. Your word is your bond, and you expect the same integrity from those around you.

However, your rigid adherence to honor can sometimes be your downfall in a world that rewards deception. You may struggle to adapt when the rules of the game change, leading you to trust those who do not deserve it. While your resilience allows you to weather any storm, your tendency to see the world in black and white can make you appear cold or inflexible. To thrive, you must learn that survival sometimes requires a touch of the pragmatism you so often disdain.

characters.name: House Lannister
characters.short_description: You are a strategic powerhouse driven by ambition, family legacy, and the calculated use of wealth and influence.
characters.profile_text:
You understand that power is the ultimate currency and that perception is often as important as reality. With a sharp mind for politics and a deep-seated desire to secure your family's place at the top, you are never one to back down from a challenge. You possess a natural charisma and a commanding presence that demands respect, often backed by the resources to ensure your goals are met. For you, a debt must always be paid, whether it is a favor returned or a slight avenged.

Your greatest strength lies in your ability to think several steps ahead of your rivals, but this can lead to a sense of isolation as you struggle to trust even those closest to you. Your pride and desire for control can alienate potential allies, and your ruthlessness may create enemies where none existed before. While you are undeniably effective, you must be careful not to let your pursuit of legacy blind you to the human cost of your ambitions.

characters.name: House Targaryen
characters.short_description: You are a visionary leader possessed of an intense, fiery spirit and a destiny that feels written in the stars.
characters.profile_text:
You carry an aura of ancient majesty and a conviction that you are meant for greatness. Your passions burn hotter than most, driving you to achieve feats that others deem impossible. You are often seen as a transformative figure, capable of bringing about radical change through sheer force of will. Whether you are reclaiming a lost heritage or forging a new path, you do so with a level of intensity that can be both inspiring and terrifying to those who follow you.

This inner fire is a double-edged sword, however. Your absolute belief in your own righteousness can lead to impulsivity or a refusal to listen to reason when your blood is up. You walk a fine line between brilliance and obsession, and the weight of your expectations can sometimes lead to a sense of alienation. To truly lead, you must balance your dragon-like ferocity with the wisdom to know when to temper your flames, ensuring your legacy is one of light rather than ash.

characters.name: House Baratheon
characters.short_description: You are a formidable force of nature, characterized by your immense physical or mental strength and a stubborn refusal to yield.
characters.profile_text:
You are the "Ours is the Fury" spirit personified, possessing a raw energy and a directness that cuts through pretense. When you set your mind to a task, you pursue it with a relentless determination that can move mountains. You value strength, bravery, and the bonds formed in the heat of battle or shared struggle. You are often the loudest voice in the room, not out of a need for attention, but because your convictions are simply too large to be contained.

Your primary pitfall is your legendary stubbornness, which can turn into a self-destructive pride if left unchecked. You may find it difficult to compromise or admit when you are wrong, preferring to break before you bend. This rigidity can make you a powerful ally but a difficult partner in diplomacy. Learning to channel your fury into constructive persistence rather than blind rage is the key to maintaining the respect and authority you so naturally command.

characters.name: House Tyrell
characters.short_description: You are a master of social grace and subtle influence, thriving in environments where charm and diplomacy are the sharpest weapons.
characters.profile_text:
You understand that true power often wears a velvet glove. You navigate the complexities of social circles with ease, using your wit, beauty, and hospitality to build a network of alliances that others can only envy. You prefer the soft touch of persuasion over the blunt instrument of force, believing that a well-placed word or a generous gesture can achieve more than a thousand swords. Your home is a place of culture and abundance, reflecting your belief that life should be enjoyed even as it is managed.

Beneath your polished exterior lies a keen tactical mind that is always assessing the shifting winds of fortune. However, your reliance on appearances can sometimes make you seem superficial or manipulative to those who value directness. You may find yourself so caught up in the aesthetics of power that you underestimate the raw brutality of your opponents. To remain "Growing Strong," you must ensure that your roots are as deep and resilient as your flowers are beautiful.

characters.name: House Martell
characters.short_description: You are a fiercely independent soul who values passion, justice, and the patient pursuit of long-term goals.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a vibrant, unyielding spirit that refuses to be tamed by the expectations of others. You are deeply connected to your heritage and your sense of justice, often harboring long-held desires for retribution or reform. You move at your own pace, like a viper waiting for the perfect moment to strike, and you are not easily swayed by the fleeting trends of the capital. Your loyalty to your kin is absolute, and you celebrate the diversity and freedom that define your way of life.

Your tendency toward secrecy and your preference for the long game can sometimes lead to missed opportunities or a sense of detachment from the immediate world. Your passions, while a source of great strength, can also lead you into dangerous territory if you allow your thirst for vengeance to consume your judgment. You must learn to balance your desire for justice with the pragmatism required to protect your people in an ever-changing political landscape.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a complex conflict, what is your primary objective?

options.text: To uphold the law and fulfill my moral obligations, regardless of the cost.
To secure my family's status and ensure we emerge in a position of greater influence.
To enact a transformative vision that changes the status quo for the better.
To crush the opposition through sheer force of will and unwavering persistence.
To find a diplomatic solution that maintains social harmony and benefits my network.
To seek long-term justice for past wrongs, waiting for the perfect moment to act.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a personal betrayal?

options.text: I endure it with stoic silence, focusing on my duty to those who remain loyal.
I ensure the debt is repaid in full, using my resources to settle the score.
I am consumed by a righteous fury, often acting impulsively to reclaim my honor.
I refuse to bend or forgive, cutting the traitor out of my life permanently.
I maintain a polite exterior while subtly undermining the traitor's social standing.
I retreat and bide my time, planning a precise and devastating retaliation.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment do you find most restorative?

options.text: A quiet, rugged landscape where the air is crisp and the rules are simple.
A grand, opulent setting that reflects my achievements and power.
A place of historical significance where I feel connected to a grand destiny.
A site of physical challenge or intense activity where I can test my strength.
A lush, beautiful garden filled with culture, art, and pleasant company.
A vibrant, independent region that values personal freedom and diverse traditions.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest fear when it comes to your legacy?

options.text: That I will fail to protect my family or compromise my integrity.
That my family's name will lose its prestige or fall into financial ruin.
That my potential will be wasted and I will leave the world unchanged.
That I will be remembered as weak or as someone who yielded under pressure.
That I will be outmaneuvered and lose the influence I have carefully built.
That my people will be forgotten or that justice will never be served.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you prefer to exert influence over others?

options.text: By leading by example and earning respect through consistent honesty.
By leveraging my wealth and strategic connections to create dependency.
By inspiring them with a powerful vision and an undeniable presence.
By being the most formidable and unyielding person in the room.
By using charm, wit, and hospitality to win hearts and minds.
By remaining an enigma and striking only when I have the advantage.

topics.display_name: Which Zodiac Element Truly Rules Your Soul?

synopsis.title: Which Zodiac Element Actually Rules Your Soul?
synopsis.summary: You might know your Sun sign, but does your inner energy actually match your birth chart? Whether you are a hidden firebrand or a secret dreamer, your true elemental essence defines how you love, work, and navigate the world. Take this deep dive into your psyche to discover which of the four cosmic forces is truly pulling the strings of your destiny.

characters.name: Fire
characters.short_description: You are a radiant force of nature driven by passion, intuition, and an unyielding desire to lead and inspire.
characters.profile_text: You possess an inner spark that refuses to be dimmed, characterized by a bold approach to life and a magnetic presence that draws others toward your warmth. Your soul thrives on action and spontaneity, often leading you to dive headfirst into new adventures without a second thought. This courage is your greatest strength, allowing you to blaze trails where others see only obstacles. You are naturally charismatic and fiercely independent, valuing honesty and directness above all else. However, your intensity can sometimes manifest as impatience or a quick temper when things don't move at your preferred pace. You might struggle with the mundane details of daily life, preferring the thrill of the big picture over meticulous planning. Learning to channel your energy constructively is key; otherwise, you risk burning out or overwhelming those around you with your sheer force of will. When balanced, you are the ultimate catalyst for change and a beacon of hope for everyone you encounter.

characters.name: Earth
characters.short_description: You are the steady foundation of the zodiac, defined by your practicality, reliability, and deep appreciation for the physical world.
characters.profile_text: Your soul is deeply rooted in reality, finding comfort in structure, tradition, and the tangible results of your hard work. You possess an incredible capacity for endurance and patience, understanding that the most meaningful achievements take time to cultivate. People rely on you because you are the rock in their lives, offering sensible advice and a calming presence during chaotic times. You have a keen eye for quality and a profound connection to nature, often finding peace in sensory experiences like gardening, cooking, or craftsmanship. While your stability is a virtue, it can occasionally lead to stubbornness or a resistance to change. You might find yourself stuck in routines that no longer serve you simply because they feel safe and familiar. It is important for you to remember that growth often requires stepping outside your comfort zone. By balancing your need for security with a willingness to adapt, you ensure that your solid foundation supports a life that is not just stable, but also vibrant and evolving.

characters.name: Air
characters.short_description: You are an intellectual explorer who thrives on communication, abstract ideas, and the constant flow of social connection.
characters.profile_text: Your soul is as vast and uncontainable as the sky, driven by a relentless curiosity and a need to understand the world through logic and reason. You are a natural communicator, skilled at bridging gaps between people and synthesizing complex information into something understandable. Social interaction is your lifeblood; you love to debate, share stories, and explore different perspectives. Your objectivity allows you to see the big picture clearly, making you an excellent problem-solver and a fair-minded friend. Because you live so much in your head, you may sometimes feel detached from your emotions or the physical needs of your body. Your mind moves so quickly that you can become easily distracted or appear flighty to those who value consistency. You might struggle with making final decisions, as you are always aware of another possibility just over the horizon. Finding ways to ground your brilliant ideas in action will help you turn your visionary thoughts into a lasting legacy that benefits society.

characters.name: Water
characters.short_description: You are a deeply intuitive and empathetic soul who navigates the world through the lens of emotion and spiritual connection.
characters.profile_text: Your soul flows with the depth and mystery of the ocean, making you incredibly sensitive to the unspoken feelings of those around you. You possess a natural psychic-like intuition that allows you to sense shifts in the atmosphere before anyone else does. Compassion is your primary language, and you often find yourself in the role of the healer or the confidant. You value intimacy and meaningful bonds, preferring deep, soul-level conversations over superficial small talk. Your creativity is often boundless, fueled by the rich inner world you inhabit. The challenge of being a Water soul is learning how to set boundaries so you don't drown in the emotions of others. Because you feel everything so intensely, you can be prone to mood swings or a tendency to retreat into your shell when the world becomes too harsh. You may also struggle with letting go of the past, as your memories are often tied to powerful emotional imprints. By learning to protect your energy and trust your inner voice, you can harness your vast emotional intelligence to create profound healing and beauty.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a sudden opportunity arises, what is your most natural first instinct?

options.text: I jump in immediately, trusting my passion to guide the way.
I pause to consider the practical logistics and long-term stability.
I analyze the possibilities and talk through the ideas with others.
I check in with my intuition to see if the energy feels right.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a high-pressure or chaotic situation?

options.text: I take charge and use my energy to push through the obstacles.
I stay grounded and focus on one tangible task at a time.
I detach emotionally to look at the problem from a logical perspective.
I absorb the atmosphere and try to soothe the underlying tensions.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these environments makes you feel most like your true self?

options.text: A vibrant, high-energy space where I can lead or inspire.
A serene, natural setting where I can touch the earth and feel secure.
An open, airy space filled with books, art, or lively conversation.
A quiet, intimate sanctuary where I can reflect on my feelings.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you find yourself seeking most in your personal relationships?

options.text: Excitement, honesty, and someone who can keep up with my pace.
Reliability, shared values, and a sense of physical comfort.
Mental stimulation, freedom, and a partner I can truly talk to.
Deep emotional bonding, empathy, and a soul-level connection.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you think about your legacy, what is the most important impact you want to leave?

options.text: To have been a catalyst for change and a source of inspiration.
To have built something solid and enduring that provides security.
To have spread knowledge and connected people through new ideas.
To have healed others and brought more compassion into the world.

topics.display_name: Which Type of Cat Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Cat Breed Matches Your Purr-sonality?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if your soul is more 'lazy afternoon nap' or 'midnight zoomies'? From the elegant Persian to the mischievous Siamese, every cat has a distinct vibe that mirrors human quirks. Take this quiz to discover which feline friend perfectly captures your unique essence and lifestyle!

characters.name: Persian
characters.short_description: You are the epitome of elegance and luxury, preferring a serene environment where you can be pampered.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of refined tastes who values comfort and tranquility above all else. You likely have a curated aesthetic and prefer the quiet corners of a well-appointed home to the chaotic energy of the outside world. While some might see you as aloof, you simply have high standards for your surroundings and the company you keep. You thrive when you are given the space to relax and be admired from a respectful distance. Your strengths lie in your poise and your ability to remain calm under pressure, though your preference for the finer things can sometimes make you seem a bit demanding. You may struggle with situations that require quick, messy action, as you much prefer a life of predictable grace. You are at your best when you are allowed to dictate the terms of your engagement with the world, ensuring that your peace is never disturbed by the mundane.

characters.name: Siamese
characters.short_description: You are a highly communicative and social individual who thrives on deep connections and constant interaction.
characters.profile_text: You are never one to fade into the background, as you possess a vibrant personality and a voice that demands to be heard. You are incredibly intelligent and curious, always seeking out new information and engaging in spirited debates with anyone who will listen. For you, life is meant to be shared, and you feel most at home when you are the center of your social circle's attention. Your loyalty is legendary, and once you have bonded with someone, you are their most devoted companion. However, your need for stimulation and company can sometimes lead to clinginess or vocal frustration when you feel ignored. You are at your best when you have a project or a person to focus your intense energy on, but you must learn to navigate the quiet moments without feeling restless. Your sharp mind and social prowess make you a formidable presence in any group setting.

characters.name: Bengal
characters.short_description: You are an adventurous and high-energy spirit with a wild streak that keeps everyone around you on their toes.
characters.profile_text: You possess an athletic grace and a restless mind that is always searching for the next big challenge. You are not the type to sit still for long; instead, you are likely climbing to new heights, exploring uncharted territories, or engaging in vigorous physical activity. Your confidence is infectious, and you approach life with a predatory focus that ensures you usually get what you want. You are highly intelligent and need constant mental and physical stimulation to keep from becoming bored and potentially mischievous. While your boldness is a major strength, it can sometimes lead you into risky situations or cause you to overwhelm those who prefer a slower pace. You are a natural leader who thrives in dynamic environments, but you must remember that not everyone can keep up with your lightning-fast instincts and boundless stamina. Your life is a series of daring feats and constant movement.

characters.name: Maine Coon
characters.short_description: You are a gentle giant with a big heart and a laid-back attitude that makes you a friend to everyone you meet.
characters.profile_text: You are known for your impressive presence and your even-tempered nature, making you the ultimate people person of the group. Despite your size or capability, you are remarkably patient and kind, often acting as the stabilizing force in your family or friend group. You enjoy being part of the action but are just as happy to sit back and observe, content in your own skin. You have a playful side that often surprises people, showing that you don't take yourself too seriously despite your rugged exterior. Your greatest strength is your adaptability and your ability to get along with almost anyone, regardless of their personality. However, your easygoing nature can sometimes lead you to be a bit too passive, allowing others to make decisions for you. You are at your happiest when you are surrounded by loved ones in a comfortable, familiar setting where you can truly be yourself.

characters.name: Sphynx
characters.short_description: You are a bold, unconventional individual who craves warmth and isn't afraid to stand out from the crowd.
characters.profile_text: You are a true original who embraces your uniqueness with pride and a touch of theatricality. Because you lack the fur of a conventional persona, you are incredibly open and vulnerable, seeking out physical and emotional warmth from those around you. You are an extrovert in the truest sense, often performing or acting the clown to ensure that all eyes are on you. Your energy is high, and your heart is even larger, as you possess a deep need for affection and closeness that drives most of your interactions. You are remarkably resilient and don't let the opinions of others dampen your spirits. However, your intense need for validation and attention can sometimes be exhausting for more introverted types. You thrive in environments where you can be your authentic, quirky self, but you must be careful not to lose your own identity in your quest to be loved by everyone.

characters.name: Domestic Shorthair
characters.short_description: You are a versatile and dependable soul who can thrive in any situation thanks to your practical and grounded nature.
characters.profile_text: You are the backbone of any community, a person who is as reliable as they are adaptable. You don't need fancy titles or elaborate displays to feel confident; you know your worth and are comfortable in any setting, from the most humble to the most prestigious. Your strengths lie in your common sense and your ability to handle whatever life throws at you with a minimum of fuss. You are a jack of all trades who can fit into many different roles, making you an invaluable friend and colleague. While you might not always be the loudest person in the room, your steady presence is what keeps things running smoothly. Your main pitfall is a tendency to be overlooked because you are so self-sufficient and unassuming. You are at your best when you are given a clear task and the freedom to complete it in your own way, proving that sometimes the most ordinary people are actually the most extraordinary.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you enter a room full of strangers, what is your natural instinct?

options.text: Find a quiet, aesthetically pleasing corner to observe from a distance.
Seek out the most interesting person for a deep, spirited conversation.
Mingle effortlessly and make everyone feel comfortable with my presence.
Perform or crack a joke to ensure I'm the center of attention.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically approach a new and difficult challenge?

options.text: With high-energy focus and a drive to conquer it immediately.
By using practical, common-sense methods that I know will work.
By talking it through with others to gather as much information as possible.
With a patient, laid-back attitude, waiting for the right moment to act.

baseline_questions.question_text: What does your ideal personal sanctuary look like?

options.text: A lush, luxurious space filled with fine art and soft textures.
A dynamic environment with plenty of room for physical activity and exploration.
A functional, well-organized home that is reliable and comfortable.
A warm, unconventional space that reflects my unique and quirky personality.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your role within a group of friends?

options.text: The stabilizing force who keeps everyone grounded and calm.
The adventurous leader who is always planning the next big outing.
The loyal confidant who is always ready for a long chat.
The dependable 'jack of all trades' who helps out whenever needed.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you react when your carefully planned routine is disrupted?

options.text: I feel quite stressed and retreat until I can restore order and peace.
I adapt quickly and find a practical way to handle the new situation.
I get vocal about my frustration and need to vent to someone close.
I embrace the chaos and see it as a new adventure to explore.

topics.display_name: Which Spider-Man Variant Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Spider-Verse Hero Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Ever feel like you are juggling a dozen different lives while trying to save the multiverse? Whether you are a seasoned veteran with a love for pizza or a rebellious punk rocker with a guitar, there is a Spider-variant that perfectly matches your personality. Take this quiz to swing through your choices and discover which web-slinger you truly are. It is time to find out if you are the leader of the pack or the ultimate wildcard!

characters.name: Peter Parker
characters.short_description: You are the quintessential hero who balances immense responsibility with a relentless sense of duty and scientific brilliance.
characters.profile_text:
You are the original web-slinger, defined by your unwavering moral compass and the belief that with great power comes great responsibility. Your life is a constant balancing act between your personal desires and your commitment to protecting others, often leading you to make significant sacrifices. You possess a brilliant mind for science and a quick-witted sense of humor that you use to mask your insecurities and keep your enemies off-balance during a fight.

Your greatest strength is your resilience; no matter how many times life knocks you down, you always find the strength to get back up and do what is right. However, your tendency to carry the weight of the world on your shoulders can lead to burnout and a sense of isolation. You often struggle with guilt over things you cannot control, which can cloud your judgment. Despite these challenges, your heart remains pure, and you are the gold standard of what it means to be a hero.

characters.name: Miles Morales
characters.short_description: You are a vibrant and artistic individual who embraces your unique heritage while forging your own path as a modern protector.
characters.profile_text:
You represent the next generation of heroism, blending traditional values with a fresh, contemporary perspective. You are deeply connected to your community and family, drawing strength from your roots while navigating the complexities of growing up in a fast-paced world. Your creativity shines through in everything you do, whether you are expressing yourself through art or finding innovative ways to use your unique abilities, like your bio-electricity and camouflage.

You often feel the pressure of living up to a legacy, but you are slowly learning that being a hero doesn't mean being exactly like those who came before you. Your journey is one of self-discovery and finding your own voice in a world that often tries to define you. While you may occasionally doubt your place in the multiverse, your empathy and determination make you a formidable force for good. You are not just a successor; you are a pioneer who proves that anyone can wear the mask and make it their own.

characters.name: Gwen Stacy (Spider-Gwen)
characters.short_description: You are a fiercely independent and rhythmically inclined hero who marches to the beat of your own drum while protecting your world.
characters.profile_text:
You are a natural leader with a strong sense of justice and a rebellious streak that sets you apart from the crowd. Your life is a symphony of action and emotion, often reflected in your love for music and your graceful, dance-like movements in combat. You have experienced profound loss, which has hardened your resolve and made you wary of letting others get too close. This independence is your greatest shield, but it can also be your greatest weakness, as you sometimes push away the very people who want to help you.

You are highly competent and confident in your abilities, rarely waiting for permission to do what you know is right. Your sharp instincts and quick reflexes make you a master of your environment, whether you are on stage or swinging through the city skyline. While you value your solitude, you are beginning to realize the importance of finding a band of allies who understand your unique struggles. You are a trailblazer who proves that strength comes in many forms.

characters.name: Peter B. Parker
characters.short_description: You are a seasoned, slightly cynical mentor who has seen it all and learned that being a hero is as much about failing as it is about winning.
characters.profile_text:
You are the version of the hero who has lived through the highs and lows of a long career, resulting in a pragmatic and sometimes weary outlook on life. You have faced heartbreak, financial struggles, and the physical toll of years of crime-fighting, which has given you a grounded perspective that younger heroes lack. While you might come across as a bit disheveled or unmotivated, your core of heroism remains unshakable. You have a wealth of experience to share, even if you deliver your advice with a side of sarcasm and a slice of pizza.

Your journey is about rediscovering your spark and realizing that your mistakes do not define you; rather, they provide the lessons necessary to guide the next generation. You struggle with apathy and the fear of repeating past failures, but your capacity for growth is your secret weapon. By embracing your vulnerabilities and opening your heart again, you prove that it is never too late for a comeback. You are the relatable hero who shows that even when life gets messy, you can still do the right thing.

characters.name: Spider-Punk
characters.short_description: You are an anarchic and anti-establishment spirit who uses your voice and your power to tear down corrupt systems.
characters.profile_text:
You are a radical force of nature who refuses to conform to anyone else's rules or expectations. Your identity is built on a foundation of punk rock philosophy, prioritizing freedom, individuality, and the dismantling of oppressive structures. You don't just fight villains; you fight the entire system that allows them to thrive. With your electric guitar and your unapologetic attitude, you bring a chaotic energy to every situation, often catching your opponents off-guard with your unpredictable tactics.

You are fiercely loyal to your friends and your cause, but you have little patience for bureaucracy or traditional hero tropes. Your pitfall is your tendency to be overly confrontational, which can sometimes alienate potential allies who don't share your extreme views. However, your authenticity is undeniable, and you inspire others to question authority and think for themselves. You are the ultimate outsider who finds strength in your refusal to sell out, proving that a hero can be loud, messy, and completely revolutionary.

characters.name: Spider-Ham
characters.short_description: You are a whimsical and resilient character who brings a sense of humor and cartoon logic to even the most serious situations.
characters.profile_text:
You are a unique blend of slapstick comedy and genuine heroism, operating on a level of reality that defies standard physics. You approach every challenge with a lighthearted attitude and a bag of tricks that includes everything from giant mallets to anvils falling from the sky. Your strength lies in your ability to find joy and laughter in the face of danger, often diffusing tense moments with a well-timed quip or a ridiculous visual gag.

While others might dismiss you as a joke, you are surprisingly durable and possess a sharp mind that can navigate the strangest of circumstances. You don't take yourself too seriously, which allows you to bounce back from setbacks that would crush a more traditional hero. Your main challenge is being taken seriously by your peers, as your cartoonish nature can sometimes be a distraction during high-stakes missions. Nevertheless, your presence is a reminder that hope and humor are powerful tools in the fight against darkness.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a complex problem, what is your primary approach to finding a solution?

options.text: I rely on my scientific knowledge and logical reasoning to find the most efficient path.
I look for a creative or unconventional angle that others might have overlooked.
I trust my instincts and take immediate, decisive action based on the rhythm of the situation.
I draw on my past mistakes and life experience to avoid repeating old errors.
I challenge the status quo and look for a way to dismantle the root cause of the issue.
I use humor and unexpected tactics to keep the situation light and unpredictable.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle the weight of your personal responsibilities?

options.text: I carry them all myself, often feeling guilty if I can't solve everything perfectly.
I lean on my family and community for support while trying to find my own way.
I prefer to handle things independently, keeping my struggles to myself to protect others.
I sometimes feel overwhelmed or cynical, but I eventually step up when it counts.
I reject traditional expectations and focus on what I believe is truly just.
I bounce back quickly, using optimism and a positive attitude to stay resilient.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your preferred role when working within a team or group?

options.text: The reliable moral compass who ensures everyone stays focused on the mission.
The empathetic learner who brings a fresh perspective and new energy.
The competent specialist who leads by example and trusts their own skills.
The seasoned mentor who provides guidance and reality checks based on experience.
The radical wildcard who questions authority and pushes for systemic change.
The morale booster who uses wit and levity to keep the team's spirits high.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your personal style or way of expressing yourself?

options.text: Classic and functional, focusing on getting the job done right.
Artistic and modern, blending my heritage with my own unique flair.
Graceful and rhythmic, often influenced by music or movement.
Casual and lived-in, prioritizing comfort and practicality over appearance.
Bold and anti-establishment, using my look to make a political statement.
Whimsical and colorful, not afraid to look a bit ridiculous for a laugh.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you react when you experience a significant failure or setback?

options.text: I analyze what went wrong and redouble my efforts to do better next time.
I feel the pressure of expectations but use the experience to grow and find my voice.
I harden my resolve and move forward, even if it means isolating myself further.
I might feel like giving up for a moment, but I eventually find the spark to try again.
I use the failure as fuel to fight harder against the systems that caused it.
I shrug it off with a joke and find a creative, slapstick way to recover.

topics.display_name: Which Social Media App Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Social Media App Matches Your Vibe?
synopsis.summary: Are you the life of the party or the quiet observer in the corner? From aesthetic curators to chaotic trendsetters, your digital habits reveal more about your personality than you think. Take this quiz to find out which social media platform truly captures your essence and how you connect with the world.

characters.name: Instagram
characters.short_description: You are a visual storyteller who values aesthetics, curation, and the art of the perfect moment.
characters.profile_text:
You have a natural eye for beauty and a deep-seated desire to present the best version of your life to the world. Whether it is a perfectly plated meal or a sunset captured at the golden hour, you understand that presentation is everything. You thrive on visual harmony and likely spend a significant amount of time refining your personal brand, ensuring that every piece of content you share fits into a cohesive and aspirational narrative. Your strengths lie in your creativity and your ability to inspire others through imagery, making you a trendsetter in your social circles.

However, your pursuit of perfection can sometimes lead to a comparison trap, where you feel pressured to maintain an idealized image. You might struggle with authenticity if you prioritize the filter over the reality of the moment. You are often the person friends turn to for advice on style or travel, but you may find it difficult to be vulnerable when things aren't looking picture-perfect. Learning to embrace the unpolished and the spontaneous will help you find a healthier balance between your digital gallery and your real-world experiences.

characters.name: TikTok
characters.short_description: You are a high-energy trendsetter who thrives on spontaneity, humor, and the pulse of the cultural zeitgeist.
characters.profile_text:
You are the life of the digital party, always ready to jump on the latest challenge or share a quick-witted observation. Your personality is defined by a rapid-fire sense of humor and an uncanny ability to find entertainment in the most mundane situations. You do not care much for rigid curation; instead, you value raw energy and the thrill of the now. You are likely a fast learner who can pick up new skills, dances, or slang in an instant, making you highly adaptable in a fast-paced environment. Your greatest strength is your relatability and your knack for building community through shared laughter and niche interests.

On the flip side, your need for constant stimulation can make it difficult for you to focus on long-term projects or quiet moments of reflection. You might find yourself easily distracted by the next big thing, occasionally losing sight of your original goals in the pursuit of viral excitement. You have a short attention span for boredom and a high tolerance for chaos, which can be exhausting for those around you who prefer a slower pace. Finding ways to ground yourself will ensure your vibrant energy remains sustainable and productive.

characters.name: Twitter
characters.short_description: You are a sharp-witted intellectual who values concise communication, real-time news, and the power of a well-timed retort.
characters.profile_text:
You are someone who lives for the discourse, possessing a quick mind and a talent for distilling complex thoughts into punchy, impactful statements. You are likely the first to know about breaking news or the latest controversy, and you are not afraid to voice your opinion, even if it sparks a heated debate. Your personality is characterized by a blend of cynicism and deep engagement with the world around you. You value information and wit above all else, often finding yourself in the middle of fast-moving conversations where every word counts. Your strength is your mental agility and your ability to connect with diverse perspectives across the globe.

However, your penchant for hot takes can sometimes lead to unnecessary conflict or a sense of digital exhaustion. You may find it hard to disconnect from the constant stream of information, leading to a state of perpetual alertness that can border on anxiety. You are highly reactive to the environment around you, which makes you a great commentator but can also make you prone to doomscrolling. Learning when to step back from the fray and engage in deeper, slower forms of communication will help preserve your mental clarity and emotional well-being.

characters.name: Facebook
characters.short_description: You are a community-oriented traditionalist who prioritizes long-term connections, family updates, and shared memories.
characters.profile_text:
You are the glue that holds your social circles together, valuing the history and depth of your relationships over fleeting trends. For you, social media is a digital scrapbook and a town square where you can keep up with cousins, old high school friends, and local community events. You are likely the person who remembers everyone's birthday and is not afraid to share a long, heartfelt post about a life milestone. Your strengths are your loyalty and your commitment to maintaining a sense of belonging for yourself and those you care about. You provide a stable, reliable presence in an often chaotic digital landscape.

However, your reliance on established networks can sometimes make you resistant to change or overly concerned with the opinions of your extended social group. You might find yourself caught up in echo chambers or spending too much time scrolling through the lives of people you have not seen in years, leading to a sense of nostalgia that keeps you stuck in the past. You value privacy but often share more than you realize because you feel so comfortable in your digital home. Embracing new ideas and stepping outside your comfort zone will help you stay relevant and energized in the modern world.

characters.name: Pinterest
characters.short_description: You are a visionary planner who finds joy in curation, DIY projects, and manifesting your future dreams.
characters.profile_text:
You are a dreamer with a plan, often found organizing your thoughts into beautiful, thematic collections. Whether you are designing your future home, planning a dream wedding, or looking for the perfect recipe, you approach life with a sense of quiet intentionality. You prefer the world of ideas and aesthetics over the noise of social interaction, finding peace in the act of gathering inspiration. Your personality is marked by a love for organization and a deep appreciation for craftsmanship and creativity. Your strength lies in your ability to visualize a better future and take the practical steps to make it a reality.

You are a self-starter who does not need an audience to feel validated in your pursuits, as you are primarily creating for yourself. However, your focus on the ideal can sometimes lead to a sense of dissatisfaction with the present. You might spend so much time planning for what is next that you forget to enjoy what you have right now. You can be a bit of a perfectionist, getting lost in the details of a project before it even begins. Balancing your visionary nature with a bit of mindfulness will help you appreciate the beauty in the current moment while you continue to build your dream life.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically share a major life update with your circle?

options.text: A single, perfectly edited photo with a thoughtful, minimalist caption.
A quick, high-energy video or a montage of chaotic behind-the-scenes clips.
A short, witty announcement or a series of rapid-fire thoughts.
A detailed post with a full photo album intended for close friends and family.
I usually don't share it publicly; I save it to a private board of personal milestones.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation for scrolling through a digital feed?

options.text: To be entertained by humor and discover the latest viral trends.
To stay informed about breaking news and join the global conversation.
To find visual inspiration for my home, style, or future projects.
To keep up with the daily lives and milestones of people I know personally.
To admire beautiful photography and see what is currently 'on brand'.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react when you encounter a controversial topic online?

options.text: I jump into the fray with a sharp, concise rebuttal or a hot take.
I ignore the negativity and focus on maintaining a positive, aesthetic space.
I use humor or a trending meme format to make light of the situation.
I discuss it within a trusted group of friends or family to see their perspectives.
I disengage entirely; I prefer to focus on ideas and hobbies rather than discourse.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your ideal 'digital footprint'?

options.text: A curated gallery that showcases the most beautiful version of my life.
A stream of consciousness that captures my immediate thoughts and reactions.
A library of resources, tutorials, and dreams I am planning to manifest.
A digital scrapbook of memories and long-term connections.
A collection of short, relatable moments that prioritize fun over perfection.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you are feeling creative, what is your preferred way to express it?

options.text: Organizing images and ideas into a cohesive, thematic mood board.
Recording a spontaneous, unpolished video to share a specific vibe or joke.
Crafting a visually stunning image that adheres to a specific color palette.
Writing a clever, punchy sentence that gets straight to the point.
Sharing a heartfelt story or update that resonates with my community.

topics.display_name: Which Sims Trait Is Your Primary Characteristic?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Sims Trait Is Actually Your Primary Personality Characteristic?
synopsis.summary: Ever feel like your life is just a series of queued actions and floating plumbobs? Whether you are constantly scrubbing the counters or accidentally starting kitchen fires, there is a specific trait that defines your Sim-self. Take this quiz to discover which classic Sims characteristic truly governs your autonomy and determines your moodlets!

characters.name: Neat
characters.short_description: You find your inner peace through pristine surfaces and a perfectly organized living space.
characters.profile_text:
You are the person who cannot relax until every dish is washed and every pillow is fluffed. Your environment is a direct reflection of your mental state, and you likely feel a surge of genuine joy when you see a sparkling clean floor. You are the first to notice a smudge on a window or a misplaced book, and you probably have a cleaning schedule that others might find intimidating. While your discipline ensures you live in a beautiful, hygienic home, your high standards can sometimes lead to stress when things are out of your control.

You might struggle to enjoy a party if you are too busy worrying about the coasters or the crumbs on the rug. However, your friends always know they can count on you for a tidy environment and a sense of structured calm that makes everyone feel more at ease. You take pride in your domestic skills, and for you, there is no greater satisfaction than the smell of fresh laundry and the sight of a room where everything is in its proper place.

characters.name: Clumsy
characters.short_description: You navigate the world with a charming lack of coordination that often leads to unexpected spills and stumbles.
characters.profile_text:
Life for you is a series of narrow misses and accidental collisions. Whether it is tripping over a flat surface or knocking over a glass of water during a serious conversation, you have a knack for finding the physical humor in any situation. You do not mean to be a walking disaster zone, but gravity just seems to have a personal vendetta against you. You likely have a collection of stories about broken plates and stubbed toes that you share with a self-deprecating laugh.

Despite the occasional bruise or shattered heirloom, your clumsiness often makes you incredibly approachable and relatable to those around you. You have learned to laugh at yourself, which is a rare and valuable strength that helps put others at ease. While you might not be the best choice for handling delicate tasks or expensive equipment, your resilience and ability to bounce back from a literal fall make you a lighthearted and endearing presence in any social circle.

characters.name: Hot-Headed
characters.short_description: You possess a fiery temperament that can flare up at the slightest provocation or inconvenience.
characters.profile_text:
You experience emotions at a higher volume than most people, and when frustration hits, it hits hard. Whether it is a broken appliance or a rude comment, you are quick to voice your displeasure with a passion that can be both intimidating and impressive. You do not hold back your feelings, preferring to let the steam out immediately rather than letting it simmer. This intensity means you are often a fierce advocate for yourself and others, never backing down from a challenge or an injustice.

However, your short fuse can sometimes lead to strained relationships if you do not find ways to channel that energy productively. You might find yourself apologizing for things said in the heat of the moment, even if your initial point was valid. Learning to take a deep breath before reacting is your greatest challenge, but your raw honesty and refusal to be pushed around are core parts of your powerful and commanding personality.

characters.name: Lazy
characters.short_description: You prioritize comfort and relaxation above all else, finding true happiness in the art of doing nothing.
characters.profile_text:
For you, the ideal day involves a soft couch, a television remote, and absolutely no items on your to-do list. You have mastered the art of conservation of energy, often finding the most efficient or least strenuous way to complete a task. While others are running marathons or climbing corporate ladders, you are perfectly content savoring a long nap or a slow morning. You value your downtime immensely and see no reason to rush through life when you could be lounging instead.

Your laid-back nature makes you a very low-stress companion who does not get worked up over small details or deadlines. You are the ultimate person to relax with because you never pressure anyone to be productive or active. The pitfall of your lifestyle is the tendency to procrastinate until things become urgent, but your ability to remain unbothered by the frantic pace of the modern world is a unique form of wisdom that keeps you perpetually chilled out.

characters.name: Good
characters.short_description: You are driven by a deep-seated desire to help others and spread positivity wherever you go.
characters.profile_text:
Your heart is your primary guide, leading you to perform acts of kindness without expecting anything in return. You are the person who listens intently to a friend in need, volunteers for the difficult tasks, and genuinely feels happy when those around you succeed. Your moral compass is exceptionally strong, and you often find yourself acting as the peacemaker in tense situations. You strive to leave every place a little better than you found it, and your empathy is your greatest asset.

Because you care so much about the well-being of others, you are a beloved member of any community. However, your selflessness can sometimes lead to burnout if you forget to apply that same kindness to yourself. You might find it hard to say no or to stand up for your own needs when they conflict with the needs of others. Despite this, your unwavering integrity and kindness make the world a significantly brighter place for everyone lucky enough to know you.

characters.name: Insane
characters.short_description: You embrace a unique and unpredictable perspective on life that keeps everyone around you guessing.
characters.profile_text:
You do not just think outside the box; you are not even sure where the box is. Your thoughts and actions follow a logic that is entirely your own, leading to spontaneous outbursts of song, conversations with inanimate objects, or sudden shifts in mood that surprise even you. You find wonder in the bizarre and beauty in the nonsensical, making your life a constant adventure. You are not afraid to be different, and you often find that the rules of society are more like suggestions.

While others might find your behavior eccentric or confusing, you bring a much-needed dose of spontaneity to a world that can be far too serious. Your primary challenge is finding people who appreciate your quirks rather than trying to dampen them. You are never boring, and your ability to see the world through a kaleidoscope of different lenses ensures that you live a life full of unexpected surprises, creative sparks, and total originality.

baseline_questions.question_text: You just arrived home and noticed a small, mysterious stain on the carpet. What is your immediate reaction?

options.text: I immediately grab the heavy-duty cleaner and scrub until the fibers are pristine.
I try to clean it, but somehow end up knocking over the cleaning bucket as well.
I feel a surge of genuine rage at the carpet for being so difficult to maintain.
I place a decorative rug or a pillow over it and deal with it... eventually.
I wonder if my roommate or pet is okay and if they were the ones who had the accident.
I start a conversation with the stain to see if it has any interesting stories to tell.

baseline_questions.question_text: It is a beautiful Saturday afternoon. How are you most likely spending your autonomy?

options.text: Organizing my closet by color, fabric weight, and season.
Attempting a DIY project but accidentally gluing my sleeve to the table.
Writing a strongly worded letter or arguing with strangers on the internet.
Napping on the sofa with a bag of chips within arm's reach.
Volunteering at the local community center or checking in on an elderly neighbor.
Wearing a tinfoil hat and searching the backyard for signs of extraterrestrial life.

baseline_questions.question_text: You are at a crowded party and someone accidentally bumps into you. What happens next?

options.text: I check my outfit for lint and move to a less crowded, cleaner corner.
I stumble backward, trip over a chair, and spill my drink on myself.
I glare at them and demand an immediate, sincere apology for their carelessness.
I don't even move; I'm too comfortable leaning against this wall to care.
I smile warmly and apologize to them first to make sure they aren't embarrassed.
I interpret the bump as a secret coded message and wink back mysteriously.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these scenarios sounds like your personal version of a nightmare?

options.text: A houseguest who leaves wet towels on the bed and crumbs on the counter.
Being asked to carry a tray of expensive crystal glasses across a waxed floor.
Being stuck in a long line behind someone who is being incredibly slow and indecisive.
A mandatory 6:00 AM fitness boot camp followed by a day of manual labor.
Witnessing someone being bullied and feeling powerless to stop it.
A world where everyone follows the exact same schedule and wears the same gray suit.

baseline_questions.question_text: If you were a Sim and your 'Social' motive was low, how would you try to fill it?

options.text: Invite a friend over for a structured evening of board games and light cleaning.
Go to the park and hope I don't accidentally walk into a fountain while greeting someone.
Find someone to have a 'Heated Argument' with just to feel some social friction.
Wait for someone to call me so I don't have to exert the effort of reaching out.
Offer 'Brighten Day' or 'Give Gift' to the first person I see.
Talk to the nearest sink or a garden gnome until my social bar turns green.

topics.display_name: Which Classic Sitcom Dad Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Classic Sitcom Dad Are You?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if you're more of a meticulous grill-master or a sentimental life-lesson dispenser? From the pristine suburbs of the 1950s to the chaotic living rooms of the 1990s, sitcom dads have defined fatherhood for generations. Take this quiz to find out which iconic TV patriarch matches your unique parenting style and sense of humor.

characters.name: Danny Tanner
characters.short_description: You are the ultimate neat-freak patriarch who balances a sensitive heart with an obsession for cleanliness and order.
characters.profile_text:
You are the glue that holds your household together, often armed with a feather duster and a heartfelt speech. Your primary strength lies in your unwavering devotion to your family and your ability to turn any crisis into a teaching moment. You thrive on routine and organization, finding genuine joy in a vacuumed carpet or a perfectly organized pantry. While others might find your obsession with hygiene a bit over the top, they know they can always count on you for a warm hug and sound advice when things get messy.

However, your desire for perfection can sometimes lead to micromanagement. You tend to worry excessively about the safety and well-being of your loved ones, which can occasionally stifle their independence. Your challenge is learning to let go of the small stuff and realizing that life is often at its best when it is a little bit unpredictable. Despite your quirks, your sincerity and kindness make you a pillar of support for everyone in your life.

characters.name: Phil Dunphy
characters.short_description: You are the "cool dad" who leads with boundless enthusiasm, magic tricks, and a unique philosophy known as "Phil's-osophy."
characters.profile_text:
You approach life with the wide-eyed wonder of a child and the relentless optimism of a cheerleader. As a natural entertainer, you are always looking for ways to make your family laugh, whether through a goofy pun or a complex physical stunt. You pride yourself on being approachable and hip, often going to great lengths to bridge the generational gap. Your greatest strength is your emotional intelligence; you are deeply in tune with the feelings of those around you and will stop at nothing to ensure they feel loved and supported.

Your pitfalls usually involve your desire to be liked by everyone, which can lead to you being a bit of a pushover or getting caught in elaborate lies to avoid conflict. You sometimes struggle with focus, getting easily distracted by the latest gadget or a new hobby. Nevertheless, your genuine heart and ability to find magic in the mundane make you an irreplaceable presence. You remind everyone that growing up doesn't have to mean losing your sense of fun.

characters.name: Uncle Phil
characters.short_description: You are a formidable authority figure with a booming voice and an even bigger heart, dedicated to excellence and family legacy.
characters.profile_text:
You command respect the moment you walk into a room, blending a successful professional life with a firm but loving hand at home. You value education, hard work, and integrity above all else, and you have little patience for laziness or disrespect. While you may come across as intimidating or stern, this exterior hides a deep well of compassion and a fierce protective streak. You are the person people turn to when they need a strong leader to navigate them through a difficult situation or a moral dilemma.

Your temper can be legendary, especially when your patience is tested by those who don't take life as seriously as you do. You sometimes struggle to relate to those who have different priorities, and your high expectations can put a lot of pressure on your loved ones. However, your willingness to admit when you are wrong and your capacity for growth show that your toughness is always rooted in love. You are a mentor and a provider who builds a foundation of security for everyone you care about.

characters.name: Red Forman
characters.short_description: You are a no-nonsense, blue-collar traditionalist who expresses affection through tough love and a dry, sarcastic wit.
characters.profile_text:
You have a low tolerance for nonsense and a high regard for self-reliance and discipline. To you, life isn't about being coddled; it's about doing your job, keeping your head down, and staying out of trouble. You communicate through blunt honesty and a sharp tongue, often using humor as a shield to protect your softer side. While you might seem grumpy or unapproachable, your actions speak louder than words, as you are always there to provide for your family and ensure they have what they need to succeed in the real world.

Your main challenge is your difficulty in expressing vulnerability or warmth in a conventional way. You tend to push people away with your cynicism, and your "my way or the highway" attitude can create friction with more sensitive personalities. Beneath the gruff exterior, however, is a man who cares deeply about his family's future and takes pride in their accomplishments, even if he only shows it with a subtle nod. You are the steady, reliable force that keeps everyone grounded.

characters.name: Al Bundy
characters.short_description: You are a cynical, long-suffering everyman who finds solace in the glory days of the past while navigating the absurdities of daily life.
characters.profile_text:
You often feel like the world is stacked against you, yet you keep showing up day after day despite the lack of appreciation. Your humor is dark and self-deprecating, born from years of working a job you dislike and dealing with a family that seems to constantly drain your resources. You find comfort in simple pleasures, like a cold drink and a quiet moment on the couch. Despite your constant complaining and your desire for a bit of peace, you possess a surprising amount of resilience and a hidden loyalty to those who share your roof.

Your pitfall is a tendency to dwell on past achievements—like scoring four touchdowns in a single game—rather than looking toward the future. You can be stubborn and pessimistic, often giving up before you've even started because you expect the worst. Yet, in your own strange way, you are a survivor. You represent the grit of someone who endures the mundane with a sarcastic quip, proving that even when life feels like a losing game, you are still in the arena.

characters.name: Carl Winslow
characters.short_description: You are a dedicated public servant and family man who values peace, quiet, and a good home-cooked meal above all else.
characters.profile_text:
You are a man of principle who takes your responsibilities as a police officer and a father very seriously. You crave a stable, harmonious home environment, though your life is often interrupted by the chaotic antics of neighbors or family members. You are patient to a point, but you aren't afraid to lay down the law when things get out of hand. Your strength lies in your reliability and your ability to provide a sense of safety and structure for those you love, often acting as the voice of reason in a room full of noise.

Your biggest struggle is managing your stress levels, especially when your personal space is invaded or your plans are disrupted. You can be prone to explosive outbursts of frustration, though they are usually short-lived and followed by a sincere apology. You sometimes find it hard to adapt to change or to let go of your need for control. Ultimately, your heart is as big as your personality, and your family knows that behind every loud shout is a man who would do anything to keep them safe and happy.

baseline_questions.question_text: Your child comes home with a failing grade on a test. What is your immediate reaction?

options.text: Sit them down for a long, heartfelt talk about their feelings and offer a hug.
Deliver a booming lecture about the importance of excellence and your family legacy.
Call them a 'dumbass' and tell them to get to work or face the consequences.
Try to cheer them up with a magic trick and offer to help them study using a 'cool' mnemonic device.
Sigh deeply, complain about the cost of their education, and go back to watching the game.
Express your disappointment firmly but calmly, then create a structured study schedule.

baseline_questions.question_text: What does your ideal Saturday afternoon look like?

options.text: Deep cleaning the house until every surface sparkles and the pantry is color-coded.
Testing out a new high-tech gadget or practicing a choreographed dance routine.
Working in the garage on a solo project where no one can bother you.
Sitting on the couch with a cold drink, reminiscing about your high school sports glory.
Enjoying a quiet, home-cooked meal with the family, provided the neighbors don't interrupt.
Attending a prestigious community event or mentoring someone in your professional field.

baseline_questions.question_text: An annoying neighbor drops by unannounced while you are trying to relax. How do you handle it?

options.text: Welcome them in with a smile and offer them a snack, even if you were busy.
Enthusiastically show them your latest hobby and try to become best friends.
Politely but sternly inform them that now is not a good time for a visit.
Give them a sarcastic remark and wait by the door until they take the hint and leave.
Try to be hospitable, but find your blood pressure rising as they disrupt your peace and quiet.
Ignore the door entirely and hope they think the house is empty.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary philosophy when it comes to parenting?

options.text: Cleanliness is next to godliness, and communication is the key to a happy home.
I'm not just a dad, I'm a 'cool' dad who wants to be his kids' best friend.
Hard work, discipline, and high standards are the only ways to succeed in this world.
Tough love is the best love; life is hard and you need to be prepared for it.
Provide a stable, safe environment and keep the chaos to a minimum.
Just keep showing up, even when it feels like the world is against you.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically express your affection for your family?

options.text: Through frequent hugs, 'I love yous,' and long, sentimental speeches.
By learning their slang, buying them the latest gadgets, and being their biggest cheerleader.
By providing them with every opportunity for success and protecting them at all costs.
Through dry wit, sarcastic nicknames, and making sure they know how to fix a car.
By working hard to provide for them and maintaining a sense of order in the household.
By staying loyal and sticking around, even if you complain about them constantly.

topics.display_name: Which 90s Cartoon Hero Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic 90s Cartoon Hero Are You?
synopsis.summary: Dust off your VHS tapes and grab a bowl of sugary cereal because it is time to revisit the golden age of animation. From the sewers of New York to the depths of the ocean, the 90s gave us heroes with attitude and heart. Answer these nostalgic questions to find out which legendary defender matches your personality. Are you a tactical leader or a pizza-loving party animal?

characters.name: Leonardo
characters.short_description: You are the disciplined leader who balances a sense of duty with a deep commitment to your team.
characters.profile_text:
You are the glue that holds your group together, often prioritizing the needs of others over your own personal desires. Your life is defined by a strict moral code and a relentless pursuit of mastery in your chosen field. While others might get distracted by fleeting pleasures or internal conflicts, you remain focused on the bigger picture, acting as the voice of reason when chaos erupts. You value tradition and respect, often looking to mentors for guidance while striving to be a pillar of strength for those who rely on your protection.

However, your greatest strength can also be your biggest pitfall. Your intense sense of responsibility can lead to self-doubt or an overwhelming fear of failure, as you feel the weight of every decision on your shoulders. You may struggle to let loose and enjoy the moment, fearing that a lapse in vigilance could lead to disaster. Learning to trust your instincts and your teammates' capabilities is essential for your growth, allowing you to lead not just through authority, but through genuine connection and shared purpose.

characters.name: Doug Funnie
characters.short_description: You are a thoughtful, imaginative soul who navigates the complexities of everyday life with a sensitive heart and a vivid inner world.
characters.profile_text:
You approach the world with a gentle curiosity and a tendency to overthink even the smallest social interactions. Your imagination is your greatest escape, allowing you to envision heroic scenarios or catastrophic failures before they even happen. You are deeply loyal to your friends and possess a creative spirit that often finds expression through writing or drawing. While you might not be the loudest person in the room, your quiet observations and genuine kindness make you a reliable and empathetic companion to those who truly know you.

Your cautious nature often stems from a desire to be liked and a fear of embarrassment, which can sometimes hold you back from taking necessary risks. You might find yourself paralyzed by what-if scenarios, spending more time dreaming about the future than living in the present. Despite these insecurities, your integrity is unwavering; you consistently strive to do the right thing, even when it is uncomfortable. By embracing your unique perspective and learning to silence your inner critic, you find that your authentic self is more than enough to handle whatever life throws your way.

characters.name: Sailor Moon
characters.short_description: You are a compassionate and spirited dreamer who discovers that the power of love and friendship can overcome any darkness.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a heart of gold and an infectious energy that draws people toward you, even if you occasionally struggle with punctuality or a love for snacks. While you might initially seem reluctant to take on heavy responsibilities, your deep-seated empathy drives you to protect those in need. You believe in the inherent goodness of people and often seek peaceful resolutions, relying on the strength of your emotional connections rather than raw force alone. Your journey is one of self-discovery, transforming from a self-doubting individual into a beacon of hope for the world.

Your emotional sensitivity is your greatest asset, but it can also make you vulnerable to the pressures of high expectations. You might feel overwhelmed by the magnitude of your destiny, leading to moments of tears or a desire to hide from the world. However, your resilience is unmatched; you always find the strength to stand back up, supported by the friends who believe in you. By balancing your playful spirit with your newfound sense of duty, you prove that being ordinary is no obstacle to achieving extraordinary things through the power of the heart.

characters.name: Dexter
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant, self-reliant intellectual who thrives on logic, innovation, and the pursuit of scientific perfection.
characters.profile_text:
You possess an analytical mind that is always several steps ahead of everyone else, finding solace in the structured world of equations and experiments. Your dedication to your craft is unparalleled, and you take immense pride in your ability to solve complex problems that baffle the average person. You prefer the solitude of your own thoughts or a controlled environment where you can focus on your latest breakthrough without the distractions of social trivialities. To you, knowledge is the ultimate power, and you are constantly pushing the boundaries of what is possible.

However, your intellectual superiority can sometimes manifest as arrogance or a lack of patience for those who don't share your vision. You may struggle with interpersonal relationships, often finding the unpredictable nature of human emotions far more frustrating than any scientific anomaly. Your tendency to isolate yourself can lead to a narrow perspective, and your obsession with perfection often results in spectacular failures when things don't go exactly as planned. Learning to appreciate the chaos of the outside world and the value of collaboration will help you turn your individual genius into a force that truly benefits everyone.

characters.name: Blossom
characters.short_description: You are the strategic and articulate leader who combines high intelligence with a fierce sense of justice.
characters.profile_text:
You are naturally inclined to take charge, possessing a sharp mind and a talent for organization that makes you the go-to person in a crisis. You value logic and planning, often acting as the strategist who ensures that every move is calculated and effective. Your sense of morality is strong, and you feel a deep obligation to use your talents for the greater good. You are articulate and composed, often serving as the spokesperson for your group and the one who keeps everyone focused on the mission at hand.

Your desire for order and control can sometimes make you appear bossy or overly critical of others' methods. You may find it difficult to handle situations where you aren't the one in charge, or where the solution isn't found in a textbook. This perfectionism can lead to significant stress when things go awry, as you tend to take personal responsibility for every setback. By learning to loosen your grip and trust the spontaneous strengths of your peers, you become a more effective leader who inspires through cooperation rather than just command.

characters.name: Arnold Shortman
characters.short_description: You are a calm, philosophical optimist who sees the best in everyone and strives to bring harmony to your community.
characters.profile_text:
You are a grounded individual who navigates the complexities of urban life with a mature and empathetic outlook. You have a knack for listening and providing sound advice, often helping those around you find their way through personal dilemmas. Your environment is your sanctuary, reflecting your love for culture and your thoughtful nature. You don't seek the spotlight, yet your quiet influence often shapes the lives of your neighbors and friends for the better, as you consistently advocate for the underdog and the misunderstood.

Your unwavering optimism is a rare gift, but it can sometimes lead you to be overly idealistic or naive about the intentions of others. You might find yourself taking on the burdens of your entire social circle, neglecting your own needs in the process of fixing everyone else's problems. While your patience is legendary, you must be careful not to let others take advantage of your kindness. By maintaining your compassionate core while setting healthy boundaries, you continue to be a stabilizing force who proves that a little bit of perspective can change an entire world.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a sudden crisis, what is your immediate internal reaction?

options.text: I analyze the technical variables to find a logical, scientific solution.
I step up to organize the group and delegate tasks strategically.
I feel a heavy sense of duty and fall back on my training and discipline.
I worry about the social consequences and imagine various 'what-if' scenarios.
I stay calm and look for a way to bring harmony to the situation.
I react emotionally but find the strength to protect those I care about.

A quiet room where I can write, draw, or reflect on my day.

A cozy spot with plenty of snacks and the company of my best friends.
A peaceful, elevated place where I can observe the world and think.
An organized workspace where I can plan for the week ahead.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle interpersonal conflict within your social circle?

options.text: I act as the mediator, listening to all sides to find a fair compromise.
I provide a logical argument for why one side is objectively correct.
I try to smooth things over with humor, empathy, and kindness.
I take charge and set clear rules to restore order immediately.
I often overthink my role in the conflict and worry about being liked.
I remain stoic and focused on the group's shared mission or goals.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest personal strength when working on a team?

options.text: My ability to envision creative possibilities and unique perspectives.
My unwavering resilience and belief in the power of the heart.
My intellectual brilliance and capacity for complex problem-solving.
My tactical mind and ability to articulate a clear vision.
My reliability and commitment to leading by example.
My philosophical outlook and ability to see the best in everyone.
